beat: Unstable ancient Rift at Commons fringe
artPrompt: Western fantasy COMIC PAGE. Large cinematic main panel of Mira Eggwarden at the mossy fringe of Riftwild Commons where a vertical cyan Fracture tear hangs wrong over mud and birch; ancient stone teeth half-swallowed by roots. Small BOTTOM inset panel (true comic inset with black border, not a floating card) showing Mira's wary face in cyan rim-light. White gutter around inset. No collage creature stickers. Earth greens and sandstone; cyan only on the tear. Original Riftwilds IP. NO readable text, logos, watermarks, UI, or lore-plate overlays.

lines.text: Beyond the last honest lamp, the fringe still argues with the Fracture.

lines.speaker: Mira Eggwarden
lines.text: You're not on any survey map. Good. Maps lie when roads rewrite.
